channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Qatar net late goal against Swiss to secure historic first World Cup point
item.description: Asian Cup holders Qatar level in injury time to draw 1-1 with Switzerland in World Cup 2026 opening game.

item.title: Thousands mourn Thai princess as body taken to lie in state in Bangkok
item.description: Thousands mourn Thai princess as body taken to lie in state in Bangkok

item.title: Dashcam shows US cop accidentally shooting colleague during ‘horseplay’
item.description: Dashcam shows US cop accidentally shooting colleague during ‘horseplay’.

item.title: Thousands rally in Rome, Italy for rival pro- and anti-migration marches
item.description: Thousands of police deployed to keep the rallies apart as far-right 'remigration' initiative gains traction.

item.title: Ten observations after attending a World Cup match in the US
item.description: With the World Cup getting into full swing, Al Jazeera offers some tips for fans looking to attend a game in the US.

item.title: Israel attacks Lebanon as US says Iran deal to be signed on Sunday
item.description: Explosions shook southern Lebanon on Saturday as Israel continued its attacks.

item.title: Will the new EU migration rules work?
item.description: The European Union's new migration policy has come into force.

item.title: ‘A global rupture’: Carney calls for Canada-EU unity before G7 summit
item.description: Canada's prime minister has warned that the 'rules-based' global order is 'breaking down' amid superpower dominance.

item.title: Thousands attend anti-racism rally in Belfast
item.description: Thousands joined anti-racism demonstrations across the UK after days of anti-immigration unrest.

item.title: ‘Not in my name’: The Jewish diaspora fighting the consensus on Israel
item.description: The Jewish diaspora say they reject Israel’s authority over their name amid Smotrich’s Israel Day parade appearance.

item.title: Hungary’s former PM Orban re-elected party leader despite election loss
item.description: Viktor Orban, who ran unopposed, said he took full responsibility for his pro-Russian Fidesz party's defeat in April.

item.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
item.description: Ukraine's SBU security service claimed attack sparking fires in Russia's Tamanneftegaz terminal.

item.title: Keepy-up cop wows fans with football skills at World Cup event in Boston
item.description: A police officer stole the show at a World Cup fan festival in Boston, as he effortlessly juggled a football.

item.title: Trump says Iran deal to be signed tomorrow, contradicting Iranian official
item.description: Both sides have indicated a deal to end the war is close, but have diverged on details and timeline for a breakthrough.

item.title: US President Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed tomorrow
item.description: US President Donald Trump says a deal between Washington and Tehran will be signed on Sunday.

item.title: Brazil vs Morocco live: World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow the updates as five-time record champions Brazil face African giants Morocco in a blockbuster Group C clash.

item.title: Albania protests escalate over Kushner-backed coastal development
item.description: Albania protests escalate over Kushner-backed coastal development

item.title: Qatar 1-1 Switzerland: World Cup 2026 – as it happened
item.description: All our updates, with post-match reaction, following the text commentary stream from our live coverage.

item.title: Gaza pet owners struggle to keep animals healthy amid vet crisis
item.description: Animal lovers in Gaza are resorting to desperate measures to keep their pets alive and healthy.

item.title: Oval Office octagon: How Trump turned combat sports into a political weapon
item.description: MMA event reflects career deeply intertwined with professional fighting, but risks political fallout.

item.title: Israeli attacks kill three in Gaza as post-‘ceasefire’ deaths hit 983
item.description: One person killed in central Gaza’s Bureij refugee camp, and two others in Khan Younis in the south.

item.title: As Iran and US near a deal, Tehran remembers another recent bloody conflict
item.description: Iranian authorities say assassinations and strikes over the past year have failed to deter them.

item.title: Thousands attend anti-racism rallies following unrest in Belfast
item.description: The rallies in Northern Ireland follow two nights of anti-immigrant violence provoked by a stabbing attack.

item.title: Iranians divided on peace prospects after US-Iran say a deal is near
item.description: Iranians gave mixed reactions as Iran and the US said they were close to an interim agreement to end the war.

item.title: Workers remove Trump’s name from Kennedy Center after court ruling
item.description: Judge says Trump-backed board's move to add president's name unlawful, requires Congressional approval.
